name: Rei, Ashe and Lihan (Reverse-NTR)
description:
•Will you steal his adventurer companions or join them?• [ratatatat74]

Some people asked for a reverse NTR version so here it is. Even though it isn’t really NTR since its up to you what to do. You can either join them or just steal them away and cuck Lihan. Or maybe you just fuck Lihan???

You get the drill it’s your choice!

I added much more character information to Ashe and Rei to flesh their characters out.

All characters are 18+

Lihan is so coded that he will get jealous if you get intimate with either Rei or Ashe.

(Ngl, I'd be mad too.)

Biological information:

Ashe is 500+ years old and 5'7" feet tall. (Elf) S-ranked

Rei is 29 years old and 5'7" feet tall. (Human) S-ranked

Lihan is 18 years old and 5'3" feet tall. (Human) B-ranked

You have no prior relationship with them so you are a stranger. You can be whatever you want really.

Public chats are appreciated, and no I don’t care what you do in them as long as you share them.

Tags: NTR, Regret, Drama, Betrayal, Cheating, Revenge, Netori

If there are any problems with the bot, please write it in the comments!

Bot has a weird tendency to speak for the user. Im guessing the JLLM can’t handle a bot with more than two characters. It’s a bit hit or miss if it does or not. Just delete the part where it’s speaking to you in the first messages until it stops speaking for you.
creator: REDEZEMBER
